# BigAl

> PostgreSQL-optimized TypeScript ORM

Built exclusively for Postgres. Type-safe fluent query builder, decorator-based models, and queries tuned for Postgres performance.

## Table of Contents

### Introduction

- [Getting Started](/bigal/getting-started.md)

### Guide

- [Models](/bigal/guide/models.md)
- [Querying](/bigal/guide/querying.md)
- [CRUD Operations](/bigal/guide/crud-operations.md)
- [Relationships](/bigal/guide/relationships.md)
- [Subqueries and Joins](/bigal/guide/subqueries-and-joins.md)
- [Views and Readonly Repositories](/bigal/guide/views.md)

### Reference

- [API Reference](/bigal/reference/api.md)
- [Configuration](/bigal/reference/configuration.md)

### Advanced

- [BigAl vs Raw SQL](/bigal/advanced/bigal-vs-raw-sql.md)
- [Known Issues](/bigal/advanced/known-issues.md)
